checklist.title: Arrival Checklist
checklist.subtitle: Complete your settling-in journey step by step
checklist.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all completed items?

checklistItems.passport-visa: Confirm passport and visa are valid
checklistItems.passport-visa-desc: Make sure your passport is valid for 6+ months and F-1 visa is approved
checklistItems.i20-docs-desc: Print I-20, admission letter, and proof of finances
checklistItems.housing-confirm-desc: Contact landlord or campus housing to confirm move-in date
checklistItems.airport-plan-desc: Contact school pickup service or arrange a ride with friends
checklistItems.phone-plan-desc: Choose a carrier and get a prepaid or postpaid SIM card
checklistItems.bank-account-desc: Bring passport, I-20, and admission letter to the bank
checklistItems.ssn-apply-desc: If you have on-campus employment, you can apply for an SSN
checklistItems.campus-id-desc: Visit the campus ID office to get your student card
checklistItems.orientation-desc: Join international student orientation to learn about campus resources
checklistItems.health-insurance-desc: Verify school health insurance plan or purchase qualifying coverage
checklistItems.grocery-explore-desc: Find the nearest supermarket and Asian grocery stores
checklistItems.transportation-desc: Figure out bus routes, campus shuttle, or consider buying a car/bike
checklistItems.tax-info-desc: Understand F-1 student tax obligations and deadlines

community.title: Community Connections
community.subtitle: Meet neighbors who care about you

hosts.title: Volunteer Partners
hosts.subtitle: They're ready to help you settle in

wechat.title: WeChat Groups
wechat.subtitle: Join WeChat groups in your area to connect with fellow students

askQuestion.title: Have a question?
askQuestion.subtitle: Feel free to ask anything — we're happy to help

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We are a group of neighbors who care about international students. We believe every student who comes to the US deserves to be welcomed, cared for, and supported. Whether you need practical help or warm friendship, we're here for you.

neighbor.title: Neighborly Love
neighbor.text: You're not a stranger — you're our neighbor. We genuinely want you to feel at home here.

practical.title: Practical Help
practical.text: From airport pickup to bank accounts, we provide the help you actually need.

community.title: Real Community
community.text: More than just information — we're real people who want to walk alongside you.

team.title: Our Team
team.text: Our volunteer team includes local residents, church partners, and former international students. Many of us have been through exactly what you're experiencing.

reentry.title: Re-entry Planning
reentry.subtitle: Whether you're graduating soon or just starting to think about returning, here are the resources and support you need

checklist.title: Departure Checklist
checklist.description: From 6 months out to your final week, step-by-step departure preparation

resources.title: Re-entry Guides
resources.description: Reverse culture shock, job hunting, shipping belongings, and more

returnees.title: Returnee Mentors
returnees.description: Connect with alumni who've already returned for firsthand advice

stories.title: Returnee Stories
stories.description: Hear from people who've been through it — real, honest sharing

checklist.title: Departure Checklist
checklist.subtitle: From 6 months out to your final week, make sure you don't miss anything important
checklist.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all completed items?

checklistItems.research-timeline-desc: Set a rough departure date and plan milestones for each preparation task
checklistItems.job-search: Start exploring the job market in China
checklistItems.job-search-desc: Research fall/spring hiring seasons, sign up for platforms (Boss直聘, 脉脉, Nowcoder, etc.)
checklistItems.notify-school-desc: Understand OPT/visa-related return procedures and required documents
checklistItems.connect-returnees-desc: Talk to alumni who've already returned for firsthand experience and advice
checklistItems.tax-filing-desc: Make sure current-year taxes are filed, understand tax obligations after leaving the US
checklistItems.shipping-plan: Plan how to ship your belongings
checklistItems.shipping-plan-desc: Compare sea freight vs. air freight prices and timelines, book shipping services
checklistItems.lease-notice-desc: Notify landlord per lease terms, understand deposit refund process
checklistItems.sell-belongings: Sell or donate items you won't bring
checklistItems.sell-belongings-desc: Use school forums, WeChat groups, or Facebook Marketplace to sell unwanted items
checklistItems.close-accounts-desc: Decide whether to keep a US bank account (recommended), close unnecessary ones
checklistItems.cancel-services-desc: Cancel phone plans, insurance, streaming subscriptions, etc.
checklistItems.medical-records-desc: Request copies of medical and dental records, update prescriptions
checklistItems.goodbye-events-desc: Say goodbye to friends, mentors, and community members. Exchange long-term contact info
checklistItems.mail-forwarding-desc: Set up USPS mail forwarding so important mail doesn't get lost
checklistItems.final-packing-desc: Confirm luggage weight meets airline limits, keep important documents in carry-on
checklistItems.flight-confirm-desc: Confirm flight time, baggage allowance, arrange transportation to airport
checklistItems.keep-connections: Create a plan to stay connected
checklistItems.keep-connections-desc: Set up regular video calls with closest friends, exchange WeChat and other contact info
